title: Ethiopian Chestnut Stew
description: A hearty, flavorful stew originating from Ethiopia, featuring roasted chestnuts as the main ingredient.
instructions: 1. Heat the stew in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add the Ethiopian spices and stir for 1 minute.
3. Add the chestnut and water to the pan, stirring to combine.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional Ethiopian spices if desired.
